description: Function Health is a health-testing service that provides members with extensive lab testing, result summaries, and personalized nutrition or action plans. Its consumer product centers on longitudinal health tracking through a web dashboard and mobile apps.
summary: Function Health exposes a documented remote MCP server at `https://services.functionhealth.com/ai-chat/mcp` using streamable HTTP and OAuth 2.0 authentication via Claude Connectors; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on functionhealth.com.
